docTitle: IBhayibheli ngekubuka kanye · Kusukela ekudalweni kuya ebandleni

share.title: IBhayibheli ngekubuka kanye
share.text: Ngekubuka kanye, tfola indzaba lenkhulu yeBhayibheli — nekutsi kungani Jesu eta.

s.ui.footer: IBhayibheli ngekubuka kanye · TiCaphuno teBhayibheli tivela ku-SWT
s.hero.title:
IBhayibheli,
ngekubuka kanye
s.hero.sub: Ngekubuka kanye, tfola indzaba lenkhulu yeBhayibheli — nekutsi kungani Jesu eta.
s.thread.note: Nkulunkulu uyetsembisa (sivumelwane), bantfu balindza sikhatsi lesidze, ekugcineni konkhe kuyagcwaliseka kuphelele kuJesu. Landzela letigcamu letili-13 letilandzelako ngaleyo ndlela — tsintsa “Funda kabanti” kuleyo naleyo khadi utfole indzaba lejulile.
s.gospel.sublead: Yindzaba yekutsi Nkulunkulu, ngemusa kuphela, wasindzisa kanjani toni letingeke titisindzise. Esikhungeni sayo kume Jesu Khristu.
s.gospel.mirror:
Umjikelezo lobutewuphela waka-Israyeli empeleni usitfombe sami

Kukhonta tithico→Kuhlupheka→Kukhala→Nkulunkulu uyasindzisa→Kukhonta tithico futsi…

Kusukela kuTikhulu kuya ekutfunjweni, ema-Israyeli ayawuphindza lomjikelezo angapheli. IBhayibheli ayikubhalanga kuze sigcona, “Babebabi kangakanani.”

Sibukiso. Liphuzu akusilo “ema-Israyeli enta loko” kodvwa “nami ngenta loko” (1 kubaseKorinthe 10:11).

Sithico akusiwo nje sitfombe lesibatjuliwe. Yiko konkhe lesikutsandzako nome lesikettsembele kuko kunaNkulunkulu — imali, kuphumelela, kwemukeleka, bantfu, ngisho nami matfupha. Nekusebentisa Nkulunkulu njengelitfusi lekutfola loko lengikufunako nako kukukhonta tithico.

Ekugcineni, sithico lesijulile kakhulu “ngumine, lengihleti esihlalweni sebukhosi saNkulunkulu.”
s.gospel.coreIntro: Pho, Nkulunkulu umsindzisa kanjani lesoni? Nansi inhlitiyo yelivangeli lelishunyayelwa yiBhayibheli.
s.gospel.crux:
Yonkhe iBhayibheli ikhomba endzaweni yinye.

Bantfu bebangeke bawephule umjikelezo wesono ngebanakwabo, futsi bekute namunye lolungile. Ngako lomunye bekufanele akhokhe inkhokhelo esikhundleni sabo.

Jesu akazange ete nje kutewufundzisa lokuhle. Njengobe kute lenye indlela yekungisindzisa, bekungekho lenye indlela ngaphandle kwekutsi ete.

Lobekufanele alengiswe kuleso siphambano bekungimi.
Jesu watfwala sono sami wabetselwa lapho esikhundleni sami.

“Kodvwa yagwazwa ngenca yetiphambuko tetfu,yafihlitwa ngenca yekona kwetfu … ngemanceba emivimbo yayo siyaphiliswa tsine.” — Isaya 53:5
s.faq.q1: ▸ Pho umbulali kufanele nje akholwe abe sewuya ezulwini, kantsi umuntfu lobephila kahle impilo yakhe yonkhe kodvwa angakholwa uya esihogweni?
s.faq.a1:
Ngumbuto lofanele. Kodvwa kunekungaciniseki lokubili lokufihlakele kuwo.

① IBhayibheli ayibahlukanisi bantfu kutsi “labahle nalababi.” Sikali asisilo “ungcono kunalomunye” kodvwa “bungcwele lobuphelele baNkulunkulu.” Embikwakhe, kute lolungile ngalokwanele (KubaseRoma 3:23). Ngako loku akusiyo “muntfu lomuhle nembulali,” kodvwa kufanana nebantfu lababili labanesifo lesifananako lesibulalako — lomunye watsatsa umutsi, lomunye uyala atsi, “Ngiphile kunaloyo.”

② Yintfo yinye nje lehlukanisa lizulu nesihogo. Akusiwo emaphuzu ekutiphatsa, kodvwa kutsi ingabe ulemukele yini Jesu Khristu njengeNkhosi nekutsi inkinga yakho yesono icatjululwe. Lowo sono sakhe lesicatjululwe ngengati yaKhristu uya ezulwini; lowo longakaze amemukele, losono sakhe lusasele, akayi. Kute kwenta lokuhle lokunganasindziso senkinga yesono.

Ngako lizulu nesihogo akusiwo “umvuzo wekutiphatsa kahle” kodvwa kungukubudlelwane naKhristu. Futsi “kukholwa” akusiyo nje imvumelwano yengcondvo, kodvwa kushintja kwalophetse imphilo yakho — lowo lomemukela ngempela akati kuphakama kodvwa uyaphendvuka kakhulu. Empeleni, kutilungisisa (“ngingumuntfu lomuhle”) sithico lesilukhuni kunato tonkhe kweliphula, lesenta sicabange kutsi asimdzingi Khristu (Lukha 18:9-14).

IBhayibheli ikusho ngalokucacile: “Lokholwa kuyo akalahlwa ngelicala, kodvwa longakholwa vele sewulahliwe” (Johane 3:18). Kwehlulela akusiko “kuhlola imisebenti yakho nawufa,” kodvwa sekunqunyiwe ngalokutsi ingabe wamemukela yini Khristu.

KubaseRoma 3:23 · Johane 3:18 · Kubase-Efesu 2:8-9 · Lukha 18:9-14
s.faq.q2: ▸ Akusanele yini nje kuphila impilo lenhle ngaphandle kwekukholwa kuJesu?
s.faq.a2:
Ngumcondvo lochutjwa kakhulu, kodvwa awucondzisisi kutsi yini inkinga yangempela. Nasi sitfombe.

Ake utibone usemikhunjini yebaphangi. Akukhatsaliseki kutsi ulihlanta kangakanani libala, ulungile kangakanani kubasebenti, imphilo yakho ilungile kangakanani — usengumphangi, ngobe utfwalwa nemkhumbi uya lapho uya khona (etandlalweni yekwehlulelwa). Inkinga akusiwo “emaphuzu ekutiphatsa” kodvwa “ngumuphi umkhumbi lokuwo” (bunjalo bakho).

Ngako livangeli alitsi “tama kakhulu kuba muhle”; litsi “shintja umkhumbi.” Yehla emkhunjini wesono uwele kuJesu — kubunjalo lobusha bekuba ngumntfwana waNkulunkulu. Loku akusiko kukhuphula emaphuzu akho ngemzamo, kodvwa kwetsembela kuLowo lowelula sandla sakhe wewele emkhunjini wakhe.

Empeleni iBhayibheli isichaza sindziso kanye njengaloku kufuduka — “Wasikhulula emandleni ebumnyama, wasibeka embusweni weNdvodzana yakhe letsandzekako” (KubaseKholose 1:13).

Ungacondzisisi kabi: loku akusho kutsi kuphila kahle akunamsebenti. Kuhle akusiso “simo” sesindziso kodvwa sitselo saso. Lowo loshintje umkhumbi manje uphila kahle hhayi ngekwesaba, kodvwa ngelutsandvo lwemntfwana.

KubaseKholose 1:13 · Johane 1:12 · Johane 3:3 · Kubase-Efesu 2:8-9
s.faq.q3: ▸ Nangabe loweceyo enelisekile, atsi “Nkulunkulu sewungitsetselele,” kantsi loweceleke usahlupheka — angitsi lomusa ushibhile kakhulu?
s.faq.a3:
Umbuto lofanele, futsi buhlungu bungebangempela. Kodvwa kusho njalo akusiko “kutsetselela kweBhayibheli” — kusonakaliswa kwako.

① Kutsetselela kwaNkulunkulu akushibhi nencane. Sono asisulwa shangatsi asikenteki; Nkulunkulu matfupha wakhokha inkhokhelo yaso ngemphilo yeNdvodzana yakhe. Siphambano akusibo bufakazi bekutsi sono sitsatfwa kalula, kodvwa kutsi sono sisindza kangaka — kutsetselela lokudvulako kakhulu emhlabeni.

② Kuphendvuka kwangempela kutsela sitselo. Nangabe loweceyo aphakeme embikweloweceleke — “Nkulunkulu ungitsetselele, ngako nginekuthula” — lokho akusiko kuphendvuka kodvwa kulingisa kwako (Matewu 3:8). Futsi kutsetselela emkhatsini wemuntfu naNkulunkulu akusuli inceba yaloweceleke noma akumphocheleli kutsi atsetselele.

③ Sono asikaze sikhululwe nje “kunjalo.” Sono ngasinye sikhokhelwa endzaweni yinye yetimbili — kungaba kutsi Khristu usitfwala esiphambanweni (kulabetsembela kuye akusekho kulahlwa, KubaseRoma 8:1), kumbe lowo lomlahla ekugcineni asitfwale yena matfupha. Ngako kute “kutsetselelwa lokushibhile.” Loweceyo nguye losanesibopho semtsetfo kulomhlaba (KubaseRoma 13:1-4).

④ Tinyembeti taloweceleke atikaze tibe ncane kuNkulunkulu. Nkulunkulu uyakhala nalabakhalako, ukhumbula tonkhe tinyembeti, futsi uyawutesula matfupha ekugcineni (Sembulo 21:4). Ngako loweceleke akudzingi atfwale buntima bekuphindzisela yedvwa, kodvwa angakwetsembela kuNkulunkulu lolungile (KubaseRoma 12:19 — “Kuphindzisela ngekwami,mine ngiyawubuyisela,kusho iNkhosi”).

Matewu 3:8 · KubaseRoma 8:1 · KubaseRoma 13:1-4 · Sembulo 21:4
s.faq.q4: ▸ Ingabe iBhayibheli yindzaba yeliciniso ngempela? Ibonakala shangatsi yinganekwane yakadzeni nome inoveli.
s.faq.a4:
Ngumbuto lofanele — futsi yindzawo lenhle yekucala. Kungabata akusiyo lephikisako lekukholwa kodvwa sifiso sekuhlola tintfo ngekwetsembeka. IBhayibheli akusiyo nganekwane lengacondzakali “yekukholwa nawufuna,” kodvwa kubhalwa lokwakhiwe etukwetindzawo, emalanga nebantfu bangempela. Ngiletincenyana letimbalwa nje.

① Akusiyo incwadzi yinye kodvwa “ilabhulali” — kantsi igeleta endzabeni yinye. IBhayibheli singcumo setincwadzi letingema-66 letabhalwa esikhatsini lesicishe sibe iminyaka leyi-1 500 babhali labacishe babe ngema-40 — emakhosi, belusi, batsephuli, umtseli wetsela, dokotela, bantfu betigaba netikhatsi letehlukene, lababhala ngakwehlukana bangatani, ngetilwimi letintsatfu (siHebheru, si-Aramu, siGriki). Kantsi konkhe kuhlangana, ngaphandle kweludvungo, endzabeni yinye: sindziso ngaKhristu. Lokwo kuvumelana lokulukhuni kuchaza ngenhlanhla nome ngekuhlela kwebantfu.

② Iyachubeka iciniseka ivela emhlabatsini (i-archaeology). Tintfo letinyenti lebetancanyelwa shangatsi takhandziwe, “letatfolwa kuphela eBhayibhelini,” tachubeka ticiniseka ngekumbiwa. Lusendvo lwakaDavide ngelitje lelibhalwe kutsi “indlu yakaDavide” (i-Tel Dan Stele); Phontiyu Philatu, umbusi lowabulala Jesu, ngembhalo lonelibito lakhe; umnyenya wemanti weNkhosi Hezekiya (2 Emakhosi 20:20), ngalomnyenya kanye nembhalo wawo. Ngisho nemaHithi, lekwake kwatsiwa “bantfu labacatjangwako,” avela njengembuso lomkhulu etindzaleni.

③ Ngumbhalo wakadzeni logcineke kahle kunayo yonkhe (imibhalo yetandla). Ngenani lemibhalo yetandla lesindzayo, kuvumelana kwayo, nesikhatsi lesisemkhatsini wekubhalwa nekukotjwa, iBhayibheli ayinakuncintisana nayo emkhatsini wemibhalo yakadzeni. Umculu wa-Isaya wangaphambi kwebuKhristu, emkhatsini weMiculu yeLwandle Lelifile (lefchwa nga-1947), wawuvumelana cishe ngeluhlamvu nomtsetfo lomisiwe weminyaka lecishe yi-1 000 ngemuva: bufakazi bekutsi iBhayibheli yagcineka kahle ngetikhatsi.

④ Lokwabhalwa ngembili kwenteka njengoba kunjalo (siphrofetho). ITestamente leNdzala, lebhalwa emakhulwini eminyaka ngembi kwaJesu, ikhomba ngalokucondzile kutalwa kwakhe eBetlehema (Mikha 5:2), inceku lehluphekako (Isaya 53:5), kanye netimo tesiphambano (Tihlabelelo 22). Kucondze kakhulu kutsi singakubeka njengenhlanhla.

⑤ Bembali bangaphandle kweBhayibheli nabo bakubhala. Sazi-mlandvo waseRoma Tacitus nesazi-mlandvo wemaJuda Josephus — bobabili bebangesibo bebuKhristu — bakhuluma ngaJesu, kubulawa kwakhe, kanye nelibandla lekucala. Ngetulu kwako konkhe, bafundzi lebebahlakatekile ngekwesaba babeka imphilo yabo engotini bafakaza ngekuvuka kwabafileko — kute lofela loko lakwatiko kutsi ngemanga.

Kepha kute liciniso, letisekelo tikhombisa kutsi kukholwa eBhayibhelini akusiko kungahlakaniphi kodvwa kuhlakanipha; akusibo “bufakazi” lobuphocelela njengelibalo letibalo. Ngako sicinisekiso semKhristu asiveli nje ebufakazini, kodvwa ekucinisekisweni lokuniketwa yiMoya Longcwele enhlitiyweni ngesikhatsi umuntfu afundza liVi. IBhayibheli itsi — “Ngako-ke kukholwa kuvela ekuveni, kuva kuvela ngekutsi kushunyayelwe ngaKhristu” (KubaseRoma 10:17). Ngako noma ngabe ibonakala kangakanani njengelinganekwane, kuyifundza wena matfupha kuyindlela yekucala. Bufakazi buvula umnyango, sicinisekiso sikhula ngekhatsi kwalofundzako.

2 Emakhosi 20:20 · Isaya 53:5 · Mikha 5:2 · KubaseRoma 10:17
s.respond.sub: Lolutsandvo akusiwo lwati kodvwa simemo. Nangabe lolutsandvo lolwabetselwa esikhundleni sakho lutsindze inhlitiyo yakho, thandaza loku kancane, umugca ngemugca.
s.respond.prayer:
Nkulunkulu,

ngiyavuma kutsi ngiyisoni lesingeke sitisindzise.

Ngiyakholwa kutsi Jesu wafela mine esiphambanweni futsi wavuka.

Ngicela ungitsetselele tono tami tonkhe, kusukela manje ube yiNkhosi yemphilo yami.

Ngemukele njengemntfwana wakho, ungiphilise imphilo lensha.

Egameni laJesu ngiyathandaza. Amen.
s.respond.after: Nangabe uthandaze loku ngenhlitiyo yakho yonkhe, iBhayibheli itsi sewube ngumntfwana waNkulunkulu. Awusawedvwa — tfola libandla leliseduze uhambe nendlela yekukholwa nalabanye.
s.respond.read: Fundza iBhayibheli wena matfupha — cala ngaJohane
s.respond.verse: “Kepha bonkhe labamemukela, ngekukholwa egameni lakhe, wabapha emandla ekutsi babe bantfwana baNkulunkulu.” — Johane 1:12 · KubaseRoma 10:9-10
s.closing.verse: “Nekufa, nekuphila … nome ngusiphi sidalwa, kungeke kube nemandla ekusehlukanisa nelutsandvo lwaNkulunkulu lolukuKhristu Jesu, iNkhosi yetfu.” — KubaseRoma 8:38-39
s.closing.small:
Etukwalendzaba, uMtsetfo, tinkondlo, baphrofethi, netincwadzi tengeta “inyama.”
Kusukela manje, nome ngabe uvula yiphi incwadzi, utawubona “kutsi ukuphi endzabeni.”
s.about.line: Lokucuketfwe kususelwa embonweni wemlandvo wensindziso, we-evangeli newe-Reformed lowabiwa linyenti lelibandla lemaPhrothestani aseKorea.

epochs.title: Kudala
epochs.events: Emalanga lasitfupha ekudala, umuntfu wentiwa ngemfanekiso waNkulunkulu, liSabatha lekuphumula
epochs.christ: Umhlaba wadalwa ngeliVi. LiVangeli laJohane lutimemetela kutsi leliVi nguJesu matfupha (Johane 1:1-3).
epochs.detail:
IBhayibheli ayicali ngenkulumo-mpikiswano yefilosofi kodvwa ngesitatimende: “Ekucaleni, Nkulunkulu…” Umhlaba akusiyo inhlanhla kodvwa ngumsebenti waNkulunkulu lonebuntfu.

  • Umfanekiso waNkulunkulu · etidalweni tonkhe, ngumuntfu kuphela lowentiwe wafanana naNkulunkulu — kutsi amati nekutsi anakekele umhlaba.
  • Kuphumula · kuphumula kwelilanga lesikhombisa kukhombisa konkhe kuphelele kunekuthula (shalom): “bekukuhle.”
  • I-Edeni · umhlaba ngembi kwekwephuka, lapho Nkulunkulu nebantfu bahamba ndzawonye.

epochs.title: Kuwa
epochs.one: Sono sangena, sintjingwa kwabudlelwane bemuntfu naNkulunkulu.
epochs.events: Kudla titselo letencanyelwe, kukhishwa e-Edeni, kufika kwekufa nekudzinwa
epochs.q: Ngitawubeka butsaemkhatsini wakho nemfati … Yona iyawufihlita inhloko yakho.
epochs.christ: Setsembiso sekucala selivangeli, lesaniketwa khona kanye ngemuva kwekuwa: “intalo yemfati” iyawufihlita inhloko yenyoka — futsi loko nguJesu (Genesisi 3:15; KubaseRoma 16:20; KubaseGalathiya 4:4).
epochs.detail:
Ngekungalaleli kwekufuna “kuba njengaNkulunkulu,” sono sangena emhlabeni. Umphumela akusiko nje kwephula umtsetfo kodvwa kwephuka kwebudlelwane.

  • Budlelwane lobephukile · naNkulunkulu (kucasha), nalabanye (kubeka licala), nemvelo (emadvolo nekudzinwa).
  • Kufa · secwayiso lesitsi “uyawufa nakanjani” siba liciniso.
  • Genesisi 3:15 · kepha emkhatsini wekwehlulela, setsembiso sensindziso sita kucala. Tati tikubita ngekutsi “protoevangelium” (livangeli lekucala).
epochs.next: Manje Nkulunkulu ubita umuntfu munye kucala kusindzisa…

epochs.title: Bobabemkhulu
epochs.events: Sivumelwane na-Abrahama, kubotjwa kwa-Isaka, emadvodzana lalishumi nakubili akaJakobe, Josefa uphakanyiswa eGibhithe
epochs.q: Ngitakwenta ube sive lesikhulu … Tive tonkhe temhlaba tiyawubusiswa ngawe.
epochs.christ: Setsembiso sekutsi “tive tonkhe tiyawubusiswa” sigcwaliseka kuJesu, intalo ya-Abrahama (KubaseGalathiya 3:16).
epochs.detail:
Nkulunkulu ucala kucatfulula inkinga yebantfu bonkhe ngekubita umuntfu munye, Abrahama. Inhlitiyo yako sivumelwane (setsembiso) — sive lesikhulu, live, kanye “nesibusiso setive tonkhe.”

  • Kukholwa · Abrahama wakholwa setsembiso lesingabonakali, kwabalelwa kuye njengekulunga (Genesisi 15:6).
  • Isaka naJakobe · setsembiso sidlulela; Jakobe (Israyeli) utala titfwala letilishumi nakubili.
  • Josefa · watsengiswa bomnakabo kepha waphakanyiswa — “Nkulunkulu loko wakugucula kwaba ngulokuhle” (Genesisi 50:20).
epochs.next: Balandzela Josefa, umndeni wehlela eGibhithe — bagcine sebatigcili…

epochs.title: Kuphuma nehlane
epochs.one: Nkulunkulu wasindzisa sive lebesigcilatiwe wasenta saba ngesakhe.
epochs.events: Tinhlupho letilishumi, iPhasika, kuwela Lwandle Lolubovu, iMitsetfo Lelishumi eSinayi, lithabanikeli, iminyaka lengema-40 ehlane
epochs.q: Ngitanenta nibe sive sami, mine ngibe nguNkulunkulu wenu.
epochs.christ: IPhasika — lapho ingati yelizinyane yaphendvula kufa — ikhomba kuJesu, “lizinyane letfu lePhasika,” lelabetselwa tsine (1 kubaseKorinthe 5:7).
epochs.detail:
Insindziso lenkhulu yeTestamente Lendzala. Ema-Israyeli labegcilatiwe akhululwa ngemandla aNkulunkulu enteke sive sakhe.

  • IPhasika · indlu lemakwe ngengati yelizinyane emnyango yendlulwa kufa — siboniso saseka tonkhe imihlatjelo leyalandzela.
  • Lwandle Lolubovu · sindziso lapho indlela iphela; “kuwela” kuba luphawu lwekucala kabusha.
  • Sivumelwane saseSinayi · ngeMitsetfo bafundza kuphila njengesive saNkulunkulu.
  • Lithabanikeli · indlu lengcwele lehambako lapho Nkulunkulu ahlala khona emkhatsini wesive sakhe — kunambatsa kwa-“Emanuweli.”
  • Iminyaka lengema-40 · kungalaleli kugcina situkulwane sizulazula ehlane, kepha Nkulunkulu uba duze ngemana nensika yelifu nemlilo.
epochs.next: Bame emngceleni welive lesetsembiso, balungisela kungena…

epochs.title: Kunqoba neTikhulu
epochs.one: Batfola live, kodvwa ngaphandle kwenkhosi ngulowo nalowo abenta lakutsandzako.
epochs.people: Joshuwa; tikhulu letifana naGideoni naSamsoni; Ruthe
epochs.events: Kuwa kweJeriko, kuhlala eKhanani, umjikelezo lophindzaphindzako wesono–kwehlulela–kusindzisa
epochs.q: Ngaleto tikhatsi sive sema-Israyeli sasingenayo inkhosi, ngulowo nalowo abetentela loko lakubona kukuhle emehlweni akhe.
epochs.christ: Elusendvweni lwakaRuthe kuvela David, naselusendvweni lwakaDavide kuvela Jesu (Matewu 1). Ngisho nasendzungunyaneni, sihlahla semndeni weMesiya siyachubeka.
epochs.detail:
Ngaphansi kwaJoshuwa bangena eliveni lesetsembiso, kodvwa ngemuva kwekuhlala basheshe bakhohlwe Nkulunkulu. Tikhulu kuphindzaphindzwa kwendlela leyodvwa.

  • Umjikelezo lowehlako · sono → kuncindzetelwa → kukhala → sikhulu siyasindzisa → sono futsi. Kuya kuba kubi.
  • Tikhulu · Gideoni, Samsoni, Debora — bakhululi besikhashana, banesibindzi kodvwa banetiphene letikhulu.
  • Ruthe · indzaba lekhanyako yekutsembeka esikhatsini lesimnyama; umfati wesihambi ungena elusendvweni lwakaDavide (nelwaJesu).

epochs.title: Umbuso Lohlangene
epochs.one: Nkulunkulu wetsembisa David: “Sihlalo sakho siyawuma phakadze.”
epochs.events: Inkhosi yekucala Sawula, David naGoliyathi, sivumelwane naDavide, Solomoni wakha lithempeli
epochs.q: Indlu yakho nembuso wakho kuyakuma embikwami kuze kube phakadze. Sihlalo sakho sebukhosi siyakuhlala sisimile phakadze naphakadze.
epochs.christ: “Sihlalo saphakadze” sigcwaliseka kuJesu, indvodzana yaDavide — yingako abitwa ngekutsi “Indvodzana yaDavide” (Lukha 1:32-33; Matewu 1:1).
epochs.detail:
Sicongo sema-Israyeli, lobesibuswa ngemakhosi lamatsatfu.

  • Sawula · inkhosi sive lesayicela; kucala lokuhle lokwabhidlitwa kungalaleli.
  • David · “umuntfu lohambisana nenhlitiyo yaNkulunkulu.” Wehlula Goliyathi wenta iJerusalema inhlokodolobha. Wenta sono lesikhulu (Bhathisheba) kepha uyaphendvuka ngenhlitiyo (Tihlabelelo 51).
  • Sivumelwane naDavide (2 Samuweli 7) · Nkulunkulu wetsembisa kumisa lusendvo lwakaDavide phakadze — imphandze lebalulekile yelitsemba leMesiya.
  • Solomoni · esicongweni sekuhlakanipha nebunjinga wakha lithempeli, kodvwa ekugcineni kwemphilo yakhe uphendvukela etithicweni.

epochs.title: Umbuso Lowehlukene
epochs.one: Wehlukana waba seningizimu (Juda) nenyakatfo (Israyeli), sive sehlela ekubhujisweni.
epochs.people: Emakhosi emibuso lemibili; baphrofethi labafana na-Elija, Isaya, Jeremiya
epochs.events: Umbuso uhlukana, kukhonta tithico kwendlula, baphrofethi bayecwayisa
epochs.q: Ngako ema-Israyeli solomane yesuka ngalelo langa alwisana nendlu yakaDavide kuze kube ngulamuhla.
epochs.christ: Kulesikhatsi baphrofethi baphrofetha ngeMesiya lotako ngalokucaca kakhulu (Isaya 9:6; Isaya 53).
epochs.detail:
Etikhatsini tendvodzana yaSolomoni umbuso uyahlukana: umbuso wasenyakatfo wa-Israyeli (titfwala letilishumi, inhlokodolobha iSamariya) nembuso waseningizimu waJuda (titfwala letimbili, inhlokodolobha iJerusalema).

  • Israyeli (inyakatfo) · onkhe emakhosi ako akhonta tithico; uyawa ku-Asiriya nga-722 BC.
  • Juda (iningizimu) · lusendvo lwakaDavide luyachubeka, ngemakhosi lambalwa lamahle lafana naHezekiya naJosaya, kodvwa lokujikelele uyehla.
  • Baphrofethi · Elija, Amose, Isaya, Jeremiya bakhala batsi “buyani!” Siphrofetho seMesiya sifika esicongweni saso lapha (“inceku lehluphekako” ya-Isaya 53).
epochs.next: Ekugcineni kwehlulela lebekucwayisiwe ngako kuyefika — batfunjelwa ekutfunjweni…

epochs.title: Kutfunjwa
epochs.one: Umbuso uyabhidlika, bantfu badvonselwa emaveni angaphandle.
epochs.events: Israyeli iwa ku-Asiriya (722), Juda iwa eBhabhulona futsi lithempeli liyabhidlitwa (586)
epochs.q: Sahlala ngasemifuneli yaseBhabhulona,sakhala khona nasikhumbula iSiyoni.
epochs.christ: Ekujuleni kwekuphelelwa litsemba Jeremiya wetsembisa “sivumelwane lesisha” (Jeremiya 31:31) — sona kanye lesivumelwane Jesu lasimisa eSidlweni sekugcina.
epochs.detail:
Tecwayiso tiyagcwaliseka. Lithempeli liyasha bantfu badvonselwa eBhabhulona — balahlekelwa live, inkhosi, nelithempeli: liphuzu lelisetulu kunato tonkhe lelisansansi.

  • Kuwa kabili · Israyeli (Asiriya, 722 BC) naJuda (Bhabhulona, 586 BC).
  • Danyela · sibonelo sekukholwa ngisho enkantolo yebahedeni (umgodzi wemabhubesi); ubona imibono “yembuso waphakadze” lotako.
  • Inhlansi yelitsemba · umbono wematsambo lomile labuyela ekuphileni (Hezekeli 37) “nesivumelwane lesisha” saJeremiya sikhomba likusasa ebumnyameni.
epochs.next: Ngemuva kweminyaka lengema-70, Nkulunkulu uvula indlela — babuyela ekhaya…

epochs.title: Kubuya
epochs.events: Kubuya ngesimemetelo saKhoresi, kwakha kabusha lithempeli, kulungisa tibondza taseJerusalema, kubuyiselwa kweliVi
epochs.q: Ningakhatsateki, ngobe injabulo yenu levela kuSimakadze ingemandla enu.
epochs.christ: Malakhi, incwadzi yekugcina yeTestamente Lendzala, igcina ngekuphrofetha sitfunywa lesilungisa indlela yeMesiya: “ngiyawutfumela sitfunywa sami” (Malakhi 3:1).
epochs.detail:
Ngesimemetelo senkhosi yasePheresiya Khoresi (538 BC) kubuya kuyacala. Ngemagagasi lamatsatfu bayabuya bakhe kabusha lokwabhidlika.

  • Zerubhabheli · wakha kabusha lithempeli (laphela nga-516 BC).
  • Ezra · ufundzisa liVi futsi avuselela kukholwa.
  • Nehemiya · wakha kabusha tibondza taseJerusalema ngemalanga langema-52.
  • Esta · wasindzisa emaJuda asePheresiya ekubhujisweni — “mhlawumbe wentelwe sikhatsi lesinjengalesi.”
  • Kulangatelela lokuchubekako · lithempeli limile, kodvwa kute inkhosi lefana naDavide. Sive silindza iMesiya.
epochs.next: Bese-ke… shangatsi lizulu litsule, kwedlula iminyaka lengema-400.

epochs.title: Iminyaka Yekuthula
epochs.one: Iminyaka lengema-400 ingenalivi lemphrofethi — kepha sigcawu besilungiselelwa ngekuthula.
epochs.events: Pheresiya → Grisi → kutimela kwemaMakhabhi → kubusa kweRoma
epochs.q: Kodvwa kwatsi sikhatsi sesifike ngalokuphelele Nkulunkulu watfumela iNdvodzana yakhe leyatalwa ngumfati …
epochs.christ: Konkhe loku “kulungiselelwa kwesigcawu” bekunguNkulunkulu lasebenta khona kuze Jesu ete kanye “ngesikhatsi lesiphelele.”
epochs.detail:
Kusukela kuMalakhi kuya eTestamenteni Lensha, kwedlula iminyaka lecishe ibe yi-400 ingenambhalo lomusha. Kepha ngemuva kwemlandvo Nkulunkulu bekalungisela indlela yelivangeli.

  • Imibuso ishintja · Pheresiya → Grisi (Alekzandari, 333 BC) → emaPhutholemi nemaSelukhide → kuvukela kwemaMakhabhi (167 BC) → Roma (63 BC).
  • SiGriki · kunqoba kwa-Alekzandari kwenta siGriki sibe lulwimi lolwatiwako; iTestamente Lendzala yahunyushelwa esiGrikini (iSeptuagint), kwavula indlela yekutsi livangeli lisakateke ngekushesha.
  • Imigwaco nekuthula kweRoma · imigwaco leyakhiwe kahle “nekuthula kweRoma” iba tindlela tekushumayela.
  • Emasinagoge nemacembu · kufundzisa kwesinagoge kuyagxila; emaFarisi nemaSadusi avela; nekulangatelela iMesiya kuyavutfwa.

epochs.title: Kuta kwaJesu
epochs.one: IMesiya leyayetsenjiswe yeta, yafa, futsi yavuka.
epochs.people: Jesu, baphostoli labalishumi nakubili, Johane uMbhabhatisi
epochs.events: Kuba ngumuntfu, inkonzo yakhe nekufundzisa nemimangaliso, kufa esiphambanweni, kuvuka ngelilanga lesitsatfu
epochs.q: Livi waba ngumuntfu, wahlala kanye natsi … agcwele umusa neliciniso.
epochs.christ: Intalo yemfati (sigcamu 2), sibusiso sa-Abrahama (3), lizinyane lePhasika (4), inkhosi yaphakadze yaDavide (6), nesivumelwane lesisha (8) — konkhe kugcwaliseka kumuntfu munye, Jesu: umPhrofethi wetfu wangempela, umPhristi, neNkhosi.
epochs.detail:
Kuthula kuyaphuka; Loyetsenjisiwe uyefika. EmaVangeli lamane afakaza ngemphilo yaJesu, kufa, nekuvuka kusukela etinhlangotsini letine.

  • Kuba ngumuntfu · Nkulunkulu waba ngumuntfu (Emanuweli, “Nkulunkulu unatsi”), endzaweni lephansi yaseBetlehema.
  • Inkonzo · ufundzisa umbuso waNkulunkulu, welapha labagulako, ubita toni. “Lobone mine ubone Babe.”
  • Siphambano · ukhokha inkhokhelo yesono nekufa lokwalethwa kukuwa (sigcamu 2). Lizinyane langempela lePhasika.
  • Kuvuka · uvuka ngelilanga lesitsatfu, wephula emandla esono, kufa, naSathane — kakade esiphambanweni “Babusi, nalabanemandla wabemuka tikhali … abehlula ngaso siphambano” (KubaseKholose 2:15).

Ngako Jesu umPhrofethi wetfu wangempela (ukhombisa indlela leya kuNkulunkulu), umPhristi wetfu wangempela (uhlawulela sono ngemtimba wakhe), neNkhosi yetfu yangempela (wehlula sono, kufa, naSathane abuse phakadze).
epochs.next: Jesu lovukile utfumela bafundzi bakhe emhlabeni…

epochs.title: Kucala kweliBandla
epochs.one: Moya uyefika, livangeli lisakateke kuya emkhawulweni wemhlaba.
epochs.events: Moya utfululwa ngePhentekoste, libandla liyatalwa, livangeli lisakateka kusukela eJerusalema kuya eRoma ngekushushiswa
epochs.q: Kodvwa nine nitawugcwaliswa ngemandla, nasefikile kini Moya Longcwele, niyawuba bofakazi bami eJerusalema … kuze kube ngusekugcineni kwemhlaba.
epochs.christ: Lendzaba isachubeka nalamuhla. IBhayibheli igcina ngekwetsembisa kutsi Jesu uyawubuya kabusha enta konkhe kube kusha (Sembulo 21).
epochs.detail:
Ngemuva kwekwenyukela kwaJesu, Moya lowetsenjisiwe uyefika ngePhentekoste libandla liyatalwa. Livangeli lisakateka ngekushesha lokukhulu.

  • IPhentekoste · Moya wenta bafundzi labebesaba babe bofakazi labanesibindzi.
  • Phetro · ushumayela livangeli kumaJuda eJerusalema.
  • Pawula · kusukela kumshushisi kuya kumphostoli, atjala emabandla emhlabeni wabetive abhala tincwadzi.
  • Kuya emkhawulweni wemhlaba · Jerusalema → Judiya → Samariya → Roma. Setsembiso sa-Abrahama “setive tonkhe” siba liciniso.
  • Natsi · indzaba ayipheli; ichubekela ekubuyeni kwaJesu nelizulu lelisha nemhlaba lomusha.

epochs.title: Kwentiwa Kabusha
epochs.one: Jesu uyabuya enta konkhe kube kusha.
epochs.events: Kubuya kwesibili, kwehlulela kwekugcina, kuphela kwesono·kufa·tinyembeti, lizulu lelisha nemhlaba lomusha
epochs.q: Uyakwesula tonkhe tinyembeti emehlweni abo, sekuyawubate kufa, nekulila, nekukhala, nebuhlungu …
epochs.christ: I-Edeni yekudala kwekucala iyabuyiselwa ekugcineni njenge “Jerusalema Lensha.” Nkulunkulu uhlala nesive sakhe phakadze — kuphelela kwa-Emanuweli (Sembulo 21:3; Matewu 1:23).
epochs.detail:
IBhayibheli ayipheli ngesikhatsi seliBandla. Incwadzi yayo yekugcina, Sembulo, ikhombisa Jesu abuya kabusha aphelelise konkhe.

  • Kubuya kwesibili · iNkhosi leyetsenjisiwe ibuya ngenkhatimulo.
  • Kunqoba kwekugcina · Sathane nekufa kuyabhujiswa phakadze, Khristu abuse njengeNkhosi yemakhosi (1 kubaseKorinthe 15:25-26; Sembulo 20:10).
  • Kwehlulela nekuvuka · konkhe lokungalungile kuyalungiswa, labafileko bayavuswa.
  • Lizulu lelisha nemhlaba lomusha · sono, kufa, tinyembeti, nebuhlungu kuyanyamalala phakadze (Sembulo 21:4).
  • I-Edeni lebuyiselwe · “eJerusalema Lensha” lekuncono kunekucala, Nkulunkulu uhlala nesive sakhe phakadze — indzawo lapho yonkhe iBhayibheli ibilibhekise khona.

Ngako manje sikhatsi sa-“kakade, kodvwa kungakabi”: kuJesu sindziso sekale saphelela, kodvwa kuphelela kwaso kusalindzelwe.

love: Indzaba ayicali ngekwehlulela kodvwa ngekudala lokutfululwe ngelutsandvo.
Lesikhashana umuntfu one, Nkulunkulu wetsembisa insindziso khona lapho.
Nkulunkulu weta kucala kumuntfu longakukufanele, wambita ngelibito lakhe, wamenta umgudvu wesibusiso.
Weva kububula kwesive lebesigcilatiwe, wehla matfupha kutawusisindzisa.
Naqalo bamkhaphela kaningi, kodvwa ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi bakhala watfumela umsindzisi wabaphakamisa.
Akazange amlahle ngisho naDavide lowawa, futsi ngaye wetsembisa iNkhosi yaphakadze.
Esiveni lesasimfulatsele, wachubeka utfumela baphrofethi, ancenga, “Ake ubuyele ekhaya.”
Wehla nabo ngisho naseveni lelimnyama kakhulu lekutfunjwa, wetsembisa kwentiwa kabusha.
Ngisho nesiveni lesehluleka kaningi, akazange asibuyisele setsembiso sakhe.
Ngisho nangeminyaka lengema-400 yekuthula, ngasese, bekalungisela indlela yensindziso.
Sasiseyitoni, watfumela iNdvodzana yakhe kutsi ibeke imphilo yayo.
Lolutsandvo lesalwemukela, manje uyalutfumela luphumele emhlabeni wonkhe.
Ekugcineni uyawesula tonkhe tinyembeti enta konkhe kube kusha ngelutsandvo.

mis.w: “Kungani Nkulunkulu enta bantfu labangona? Bekungeke kube ncono kutsi angasenti nje?”
mis.t: Nkulunkulu wadala umhlaba nebantfu hhayi ngekuswela lokutsite, kodvwa ngelutsandvo loluchichimako. Kwenta bantfu babantfu labatibandzakanya naNkulunkulu kona kucobo lwalo lutsandvo. Futsi ngisho nekungena kwesono akuphumanga ngaphandle kwecebo lensindziso laNkulunkulu (Kubase-Efesu 1:4-5). Sigcamu sekucala seBhayibheli akusiko kwehlulela kodvwa lutsandvo.

mis.w: “Kukhishwa nekuniketwa kufa ngenca yekudla titselo letinye nje — angitsi Nkulunkulu ukhokho kakhulu?”
mis.t: Kukhishwa e-Edeni bekukwehlulela kanye nemusa. Kudla esihlahleni sekuphila uphile phakadze kuleso simo lesephukile, lesehlukene naNkulunkulu, bekutawukubopha ekuhluphekeni phakadze (Genesisi 3:22). Kuvumela kufa kwavula indlela yekubuyela, futsi khona lapho Nkulunkulu wetsembisa uMsindzisi (Genesisi 3:15). Lutsandvo selukale lukhona ekwehluleleni.

mis.w: “Abrahama wakhetfwa ngenca yekukholwa kwakhe lokukhulu — angitsi bonkhe bantfu beBhayibheli bangemachawe ekutiphatsa?”
mis.t: Abrahama naye waca futsi wangabata; Jakobe abeyinkhohlisi. Nkulunkulu akazange abite bantfu “labafanele” kodvwa labanetiphene, ngemusa. Sizatfu sekukhetfwa asisiso bunhle babo kodvwa lutsandvo lwaNkulunkulu lolwetsembekile (Dutheronomi 7:7-8).

mis.w: “Angitsi uMtsetfo (iMitsetfo) sivivinyo lekufanele usiphase kuze usindziswe?”
mis.t: Nkulunkulu wabasindzisa ngembi kwekubanika uMtsetfo. Ngisho neMitsetfo Lelishumi icala ngesitatimende sensindziso: “NginguSimakadze Nkulunkulu wenu lowanikhipha eGibhithe” (Eksodusi 20:2). UMtsetfo akusiko “wugcine kuze usindziswe,” kodvwa siphakamiso selutsandvo sekutsi sive lesesisindzisiwe siphile kanjani (Dutheronomi 7:7-9). Umusa ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi uta kucala; kulalela kuyimphendvulo.

mis.w: “Kunqoba kweKhanani bekukubulawa lokungenamusa — ngako Nkulunkulu weTestamente Lendzala unesihluku ngempela.”
mis.t: Lena yindzaba lelukhuni lengeke icatjululwe ngemusho munye, futsi idzinga kunakekela. Kodvwa iBhayibheli ayiyibeki njengeludlame lolungenasizatfu kodvwa njengekwehlulela ngemuva kwemakhulu eminyaka yebubele kububi lobukhulu (kufaka nekuhlatjwa kwebantfwana) (Genesisi 15:16; Dutheronomi 9:4-5; Levithikusi 18:24-25). Nkulunkulu uyephuta ngisho ekwehluleleni, futsi wabemukela ngenjabulo labamphendvukela — ngisho netihambi letifana naRahabi naRuthe (Joshuwa 6:25; Ruthe 4:13-17).

mis.w: “David abelichawe lelingenasici — yingako abitwa ‘umuntfu lohambisana nenhlitiyo yaNkulunkulu.’”
mis.t: David wenta buphingi waze wabulala. “Umuntfu lohambisana nenhlitiyo yaNkulunkulu” akusho lokungenasici, kodvwa lowo longazange acashe sono sakhe — lowaphendvuka ngalokuphelele wabuyela njalo kuNkulunkulu (Tihlabelelo 51). Lutsandvo lwaNkulunkulu alulahli ngisho nalabawa kabuhlungu.

mis.w: “Baphrofethi babhula labukela likusasa / Nkulunkulu weTestamente Lendzala ululaka lodvwa.”
mis.t: Inhlitiyo yemphrofethi akusiko “kubukela likusasa” kodvwa kuncenga lokubuhlungu kwaNkulunkulu: “Ake ubuyele.” Ngisho secwayiso sekwehlulela asihlosi kubhubisa kodvwa kuphendvula bantfu kubasindzisa — “angikujabuleli kufa kwalomubi” (Hezekeli 33:11).

mis.w: “Kutfunjwa kufakazela kutsi Nkulunkulu wayilahla yonkhe ema-Israyeli.”
mis.t: Kutfunjwa bekungesiko kushiya kodvwa kuyala nekuhlanta umntfwana lotsandzekako (KumaHebheru 12:6). Nkulunkulu akazange ahambe; wabanaDanyela ekhatsi kwekutfunjwa wetsembisa, “ngiyawati emasu lenginawo ngani … emasu ekuninika litsemba nelikusasa” (Jeremiya 29:11).

mis.w: “Njengobe kungazange kube nelivi iminyaka lengema-400, Nkulunkulu wahamba nome bekaphumula.”
mis.t: Kuthula akusiko kungabikho. Wamane angakhulumi, kantsi sonkhe leso sikhatsi bekagucuca imibuso, tilwimi, nemigwaco kulungisela sigcawu sensindziso. Esikhatsini lesithulile kakhulu, Nkulunkulu bekasebenta kakhulu, ngelutsandvo (KubaseGalathiya 4:4).

mis.w: “Jesu bekanguye nje munye wabafundzisi labahle bekutiphatsa / siphambano bekukwehlulwa lokubuhlungu.”
mis.t: Jesu watimemetela kutsi unguNkulunkulu (Johane 8:58), futsi siphambano bekungesiko ingoti nome kwehlulwa kodvwa lutsandvo loluhleliwe. Akazange advonselwe lapho ngemandla; wabeka imphilo yakhe ngekutsandza kwakhe (Johane 10:18). “Kute umuntfu lonelutsandvo lolukhulu kunalolu kwekutsi adzele kuphila kwakhe ngenca yetihlobo takhe” (Johane 15:13).

mis.w: “Libandla licembu lebantfu labaphelele, nome nje sakhiwo.”
mis.t: Libandla akusiwo lichaza “labangcwele labaphelele” kodvwa letoni letitsetselelwe. Ngisho nemphostoli Pawula watibita ngekutsi “lesikhulu kunato tonkhe” (1 kuThimothi 1:15). Libandla lekucala nalo laphikisana lawa (Imisebenti yebaPhostoli 6:1; 1 kubaseKorinthe 1:11). Akusiyo indzawo yekutigabatisa, kodvwa bantfu labadlulisela lutsandvo labalwemukele (Johane 13:34-35).

core.title: Sono sekudala — kute lolungile
core.body: Inkinga akusiko “imisebenti lemibi lembalwa” kodvwa imphandze yenhlitiyo. Kusukela ku-Adamu, bonkhe batalwa ngaphansi kwesono futsi ngekwabo bangeke bafinyelele kuNkulunkulu.
core.vtext: Kute namunye lolungile … Bonkhe bantfu bonile, bakhashane kakhulu nenkhatimulo yaNkulunkulu.

core.title: UMtsetfo ungeke ungisindzise
core.body: UMtsetfo akusiwo ligciba kodvwa sibukiso. Nawutama kakhulu, ukhombisa kakhulu kutsi usilela kangakanani. Inhloso yawo kusiyisa kuKhristu.
core.vtext: Umtsetfo wenta bantfu basati sono … umtsetfo wasebenta njengemcondzisi wetfu wekusiyisa kuKhristu.

core.title: Ngemusa — sipho, hhayi umzamo
core.body: Sindziso akusiyo inkhokhelo yemisebenti loyentile, kodvwa sipho semahhala kulabangakufaneli. Ngako kute longatigabatisa.
core.vtext: Empeleni kusindziswa kwenu ngekukholwa kuya ngemusa, futsi loko akuveli kini, sipho nje saNkulunkulu. Loko akuveli ngemisebenti, funa kube khona lotibongako.

core.title: Kwentiwa kulunga ngekukholwa
core.body: Hhayi ngekugcina uMtsetfo, kodvwa ngekukholwa kuJesu Khristu wentiwa lolungile — awembatsiswa ngekulunga kwakho kodvwa ngekwakhe.
core.vtext: Njengobe sesentiwe semukeleka kuNkulunkulu kutsi silungile ngekukholwa … umuntfu wemukeleka kuNkulunkulu kutsi ulungile ngekukholwa kwakhe nguKhristu Jesu.

core.title: IBhayibheli ikhomba kuJesu
core.body: IBhayibheli akusiyo incwadzi yemadvodza lamakhulu nome yekutisita. Kusukela kuGenesisi kuya kuSembulo, lonkhe likhasi lifakaza ngemuntfu munye — Jesu Khristu.
core.vtext: ngiyo lucobo lefakaza ngami … Jesu wase uyabachazela ngako konkhe lokwakuphatselene naye emiBhalweni.

core.title: Umbuso waNkulunkulu — umlayeto waJesu lobalulekile
core.body: Yindzaba Jesu layifundzisa kakhulu. Umbuso lapho Nkulunkulu abusa khona njengeNkhosi wangena emhlabeni naJesu uyawuphelela ekubuyeni kwakhe. Ngesiphambano nekuvuka, Jesu yiNkhosi yangempela leyehlula sono, kufa, naSathane.
core.vtext: Sikhatsi sesifikile, umbuso waNkulunkulu sewusondzele. Phendvukani nikholwe liVangeli.

core.title: LiVangeli — wakuphelelisa konkhe
core.body: Sikweletu sesono lebengingeke ngisikhokhe, Jesu wasikhokha esikhundleni sami esiphambanweni, ngekuvuka wehlula kufa. Angetsembeli ku-“yenta loku” kodvwa ku-“kuphelele.”
core.vtext: Kuphelele … Nkulunkulu sewulukhombisile lutsandvo lwakhe kitsi ngekutsi sisetoni Khristu wafa esikhundleni setfu.
